## How was it tested?

- [ ] Ran `kb start` and verified server starts
- [ ] Tested affected MCP tools

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing patterns (ES modules, async/await, Express)
- [ ] No hardcoded personal paths or domains
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] EXTENDING.md updated if adding new extension points
- [ ] New MCP tools follow `kb_toolname` naming convention
